headline: What Makes Keysight Technologies (KEYS) a Defensive Opportunity in AI Infrastructure Build-Out?
summary: Janus Henderson Investors, an investment management company, released its “Global Sustainable Equity Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the fourth quarter of 2025, global equity markets experienced a significant upswing, with many indices hitting new all-time highs. Resilient equity markets, favorable monetary policies, and ongoing momentum […]

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Keysight Techs, Raises Price Target to $310
summary: Baird  analyst Richard Eastman   maintains Keysight Techs (NYSE:KEYS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $295 to $310.

headline: 5 Stock Picks Last Week From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: US stocks closed lower, with Nasdaq falling 2%. S&P 500 and Dow also declined. Benzinga's Analyst Ratings API can help investors make informed decisions.
